case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS. FASCINATION CONSUMER ENTERPRISES, INC. ET AL.

docket_entries.description: REQUEST FOR CLERK'S JUDGMENT BY DEFAULT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT FASCINATION CONSUMER ENTERPRISES, INC.

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - COMMERCIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT FASCINATION CONSUMER ENTERPRISES, INC. DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF DEFAULT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT FASCINATION CONSUMER ENTERPRISES, INC.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO SERVED JUN-04-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT FASCINATION CONSUMER ENTERPRISES, INC.
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED ( PLACED IN PICK-UP BOX ) AS TO DEFENDANT FASCINATION CONSUMER ENTERPRISES, INC.
DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO AS TO DEFENDANT FASCINATION CONSUMER ENTERPRISES, INC.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FASCINATION CONSUMER ENTERPRISES, INC. THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: PIER 29 1/2 ( APPROX. 13,657 SQ. FT. OF SHED SPACE, 1,484 SQ. FT. OF OFFICE STORAGE, LEASE FORFEITED, SPACE, AND 4,450 FT. OF OFFICE SPACE ) IN THE CITY AND COUNTY OF S.F. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
